SPAM DEATHMATCH WHEN NOT IN RANKED
SPEND MORE TIME FOCUSING ON YOUR SURROUNDINGS, STOP TUNNEL VISIONING INDIVIDUAL HEROES.
AVOID CONCENTRATING ON NON-IMPORTANT ASPECTS OF THE GAME - TEAM PICKS / DRAMA / CHATTER, GRIEFING.
DURING DEATHTIME CONCENTRATE STRICTLY ON EXACTLY WHY I DIED AND HOW IT COULD HAVE BEEN AVOIDED
FOCUS ON STAYING POSITIVE 100% OF THE TIME
MUTE TOXIC TEAM MATES WITHOUT RESPONDING
ACCEPT THE FACT IT'S OK TO LOSE MORE THAN YOU WIN OCCASIONALLY
NEVER FOCUS ON A TEAM MATES' MISTAKES. IF THERE'S SOMETHING CONSTRUCTIVE (NOT CONDESCENDING) TO POINT OUT, DO IT IN A FRIENDLY WAY.
TRY TO HAVE MORE FUN WITH THE GAME IN GENERAL, BE ACTIVE IN CHAT IN A FUN WAY, NOT A NEGATIVE.
FOCUS ON MELEE COMBO ON EVERY JUMP, EXCEPT FOR CERTAIN SITUATIONS - LANDING ON A GRAV, MULTIPLE TARGETS IN GENERAL
CONTINUE FOCUSSING ON BUBBLE TIMING FOR FLASHBANG, SLEEP DART AND CHAIN HOOK
IMPROVE TRACKING ON VERTICAL TARGETS, MAINLY GENJI'S FLYING AROUND
LET YOUR REINHARDT MAKE A PLAY BEFORE NANOBOOSTING HIM SO HE DOESN'T GET COUNTERED IMMEDIATELY
AS MERCY, DON'T TUNNEL VISION ON SOULS WAITING FOR YOUR REZ TO GET UP. YOU'LL GET KILLED.
AS MERCY, DON'T REZ JUST BECAUSE YOU CAN
A DISCORD ORB A DAY KEEPS THE FLANKERS AWAY
ANA MAINS DON'T LIKE TO PLAY MERCY. REALLY.
ANA'S SLEEP LASTS 5 SECONDS ON MOST HEROES, AND ONLY 3.5 SECONDS ON TANKS. USE IT WISELY.
ANA'S BIOTIC GRENADE WILL BLOCK ALL HEALING ON ENEMIES FOR 3 SECONDS. BE AWARE OF THAT WHEN COMBOING WITH ALLIES.
IF YOU HAVE A SUPPORT THAT IS STRUGGLING WITH A FLANKER, TRY AND STAY NEAR THEM.
AS MOIRA, YOU DON'T NEED TO STOP FIRING TO THROW A BIOTIC ORB. TAP E MID-ATTACK TO LAUNCH A DAMAGE OR HEALING ORB WITHOUT INTERRUPTING YOUR BIOTIC GRASP.
MOIRA'S BIOTIC GRASP LEAVES A HEAL-OVER-TIME OF ~17 HP/S FOR 3 SECONDS AFTER HEALING. TAP-HEAL TO EXTEND EFFICIENT HEALING AND SAVE YOUR BIOTIC ENERGY METER.

TORBJORN'S TURRETS HAVE 225 HP AND CAN BE REPAIRED. DON'T PLACE THEM IN OBVIOUS SPOTS, POSITION THEM WHERE THEY'LL FLANK THE ENEMY JUST AS YOUR TEAM ENGAGES, FORCING THE ENEMY TO DEAL WITH THREATS FROM MULTIPLE DIRECTIONS.
SOMBRA WORKS BEST IF YOU PLAY HER LIKE YOU WOULD PLAY REAPER. TRY TO FLANK BEHIND THE ENEMY TEAM AND DON'T LET THEM KNOW YOU'RE THERE FOR AS LONG AS POSSIBLE.
ALWAYS GO FOR THE SQUISHIER TARGETS FIRST; SUPPORTS ARE IDEAL, BUT BE WARY OF STUN ABILITIES. GO FROM THE WEAKEST HEROES WITH THE LEAST HP TO THE MOST; SAVE THE TANKS FOR THE VERY LAST
DON'T ALWAYS LOOK FOR ENEMIES TO KILL BUT RATHER LOOK FOR TEAMMATES TO HELP.
PLEASE, DON'T REPORT FUEY.
GROUP UP. NO, YOU CANNOT DIVE INTO THE ENEMY TEAM 1V6 AND EXPECT HEALING.
MUTE TOXIC PLAYERS. YOU WON'T CHANGE THEIR WAYS, AND THEIR ONLY GOAL IS TO MAKE YOUR GAME LESS ENJOYABLE.
AIM TO THE NECK.
ALT + Z WILL TOGGLE THE UI (USER INTERFACE). CAREFUL WITH THAT.
CTRL + SHIFT + N WILL SHOW YOU THE NETGRAPH, WHICH IS INTENDED FOR TROUBLESHOOTING NETWORK PROBLEMS.
YOU CAN INTERRUPT DOOMFIST'S METEOR STRIKE WITH DISRUPTIVE ABILITIES (SLEEP DART, HOOK, ETC.) AS HE LANDS. MEI'S ICE WALL PLACED DIRECTLY UNDER HIM CAN ALSO DISRUPT THE LANDING.
AS SYMMETRA, USE YOUR TELEPORTER AS A DECOY.
AS JUNKRAT, THE CONCUSSION MINE WILL ALWAYS LAUNCH YOU UPWARDS, USE IT TO REACH HIGH GROUND OR ESCAPE QUICKLY.
AS WINSTON, IF YOU'RE TRYING TO DIVE THE ENEMY TEAM ALONE, TRY TO SAVE YOUR JUMP PACK AS A METHOD OF ESCAPE INSTEAD OF ENGAGEMENT.
TALK TO YOUR TEAM ABOUT WHICH ULTS TO COMBO TOGETHER TO USE AS FEW AS POSSIBLE TO WIN A TEAMFIGHT.
ASK YOURSELF: WHERE IS EVERYONE? WHERE IS MY TEAM? WHERE IS THEIR TEAM? WHAT POINT ARE WE PLAYING ON?
ASK YOURSELF: WHAT HERO AM I PLAYING? IS IT CLOSE, MEDIUM, OR LONG RANGE? HOW MUCH HEALTH DO I HAVE? WHAT ABILITIES DO I HAVE FOR MOBILITY AND SURVIVABILITY?
ASK YOURSELF: WHAT IS MY TEAM COMPOSITION? DOES IT HAVE BARRIERS I CAN HIDE BEHIND? IS THERE A LOT OF HEALING? IS THERE A LONG RANGE HEALER, OR DO I HAVE TO BE NEAR THEM FOR HEALING?
ASK YOURSELF: WHAT IS THE ENEMY TEAM COMPOSITION? DO THEY HAVE A SNIPER? DO THEY HAVE FLANKERS? ARE THEY ABLE TO EASILY GET TO WHEREVER I AM WITH MOBILITY ABILITIES?
ASK YOURSELF: WHAT ABILITIES ARE AVAILABLE TO THE ENEMY? DOES ZARYA HAVE GRAVITON SURGE READY? IS GENJI CLOSE TO DRAGON BLADE? HAS CASSIDY USED HIS FLASHBANG?
ASK YOURSELF: WHAT DOES THE MAP LOOK LIKE? IS IT WIDE OPEN? ARE THERE PLACES THAT I CAN EASILY USE FOR COVER? IS THERE HIGH GROUND? WHAT ARE THE LIKELY PLACES THE ENEMY TEAM IS COMING FROM?

IF AN ENEMY HAS ARMOR, EVERY HIT THAT DEALS LESS THAN 14 DMG IS HALVED, AND THOSE THAT DEAL MORE THAN 14 ARE REDUCED BY 7. BEAMS ARE ALWAYS REDUCED BY 30%. ARMOR IS WEAK AGAINST BURST DAMAGE BUT STRONG AGAINST RAPID FIRE WEAPONS.
IF AN ENEMY HAS ARMOR, USE BURST DAMAGE LIKE SOLDIER: 76'S HELIX ROCKET TO CUT THROUGH IT QUICKLY, HIGH-DAMAGE SINGLE HITS ARE FAR MORE EFFICIENT THAN RAPID FIRE AGAINST ARMOR.
AS BAPTISTE, WHEN STARTING YOUR ULT, IT RECHARGES YOUR CLIP AND YOU CAN PUT UP AN IMMORTALITY FIELD WITHOUT LOSING TIME.
AS ORISA, THINK SMART ABOUT WHEN TO PICK HER. MAPS WITH LOTS OF HIGH GROUND ARE NOT IDEAL FOR HER SINCE SHE LACKS VERTICAL MOBILITY.
AS SOMBRA, HACKING A REINHARDT ESPECIALLY AT THE BEGINNING OF A TEAM FIGHT WILL ALMOST ALWAYS WIN YOU THAT FIGHT.
AS SOMBRA, EMP IS AN ENGAGER AND SHOULD NOT BE USED AS AN ANSWER TO AN ONGOING FIGHT MOST OF THE TIME.
ZARYA'S RIGHT CLICK (SECONDARY FIRE) IS INSANE AGAINST TANKS IN CLOSE RANGE.
AS ZARYA, YOU CANNOT WIN A 1-ON-1 ENCOUNTER AGAINST A FULL HEALTH WINSTON EVEN IF YOUR BEAM IS FULLY CHARGED.
IF YOU'RE PLAYING WINSTON AND YOU GET NANOBOOSTED, DON'T ULT INTO PRIMAL RAGE. YOUR DPS IS ACTUALLY BETTER IN YOUR NORMAL TESLA CANNON FORM WITH THE NANO BOOST.
AS ZARYA, BUBBLING A REINHARDT WHILE HIS SHIELD IS UP WORKS, IT STILL GIVES YOU ENERGY FROM DAMAGE ABSORBED BY THE BARRIER.
WHEN FACING GENJI AS CASSIDY, REMEMBER FLASHBANG IS AN AOE, AIM IT ABOVE OR AROUND DEFLECT'S HITBOX TO STILL CATCH HIM. ANA'S SLEEP DART ALSO GOES THROUGH DEFLECT.
THE PAYLOAD HEALS AT A RATE OF 10 HPS.
HANZO'S SONIC ARROW CAN STILL KILL IF STUCK ON A SHIELD.

ARMOR IS SHOWN AS ORANGE ON THE HEALTH BAR. IT REDUCES ALL DAMAGE INSTANCES BY 7 FLAT (OR HALVES HITS THAT DEAL LESS THAN 14 DMG). BEAMS ARE ALWAYS REDUCED BY 30%. IN OW2, TEMP ARMOR NO LONGER EXISTS, IT'S BEEN REPLACED BY OVERHEALTH (GREEN).

YOU DON'T ACTUALLY GET INTO A MATCH FASTER WHEN SKIPPING THE END OF ROUND FLOW (VICTORY POSES, POTG, CARDS, STATS ETC.). YOU DON'T GET ENTERED INTO THE MATCHMAKING QUEUE UNTIL YOUR PREVIOUS MATCH RESOLVES COMPLETELY.
IF YOU SHOOT A HELIX ROCKET AT D.VA AS HER MECH IS FLASHING RED RIGHT BEFORE SHE HOPS OUT, IT WILL TAKE OUT A LARGE PORTION OF HER HEALTH.
AS ORISA, DO NOT FORTIFY DURING ROADHOG'S WHOLE HOG. THE KNOCKBACK ACTUALLY PROTECTS YOU FROM TAKING FULL DAMAGE, FORTIFYING WILL LET HOG MELT YOU IN PLACE.
AS WINSTON, GET WITHIN JUMP RANGE OF A SQUISHY TARGET WITHOUT USING YOUR JUMP OR YOUR BUBBLE. WAIT FOR COOLDOWNS THEN JUMP THE TARGET WITH JUMP+MELEE.
AS ZENYATTA, YOUR ORB OF HARMONY IS A LOT MORE EFFECTIVE ON A HERO LIKE GENJI THAN ON A TANK, LOW HEALTH HEROES BENEFIT MORE FROM SUSTAINED HEALING.
TEAM MORALE IS THE MOST IMPORTANT THING
ANA'S RIFLE: 75 HEALING / 75 DAMAGE PER SHOT. HER BIOTIC GRENADE: 75 HEALING / 75 DMG. SLEEP DART: 5 DMG. NANO BOOST: +50% DAMAGE DEALT AND -50% DAMAGE TAKEN FOR 8 SECONDS.

BRIGITTE'S ROCKET FLAIL DOES 45 DMG PER SWING. WHIPSHOT DOES 70 DMG. REPAIR PACK HEALS 25 INSTANTLY + 100 OVER TIME (3 CHARGES, 5s CD). RALLY GIVES BRIGITTE 100 ARMOR AND PROVIDES UP TO 100 OVERHEALTH TO NEARBY ALLIES.
LUCIO'S HEAL AURA: 20 HP/S (12 HP/S FOR HIMSELF). AMPED: 56 HP/S FOR 3 SECONDS. SOUND BARRIER GIVES 625 OVERHEALTH TO NEARBY ALLIES FOR 5 SECONDS.
MERCY'S CADUCEUS STAFF HEALS 55 HP/S OR AMPLIFIES 30% DMG DEALT. HER BLASTER DOES 100 DPS. SHE ALSO HAS FLASH HEAL: A 60 HP INSTANT HEAL (DOUBLED TO 120 ON ALLIES BELOW 50% HP) ON A 12s COOLDOWN.

MOIRA'S BIOTIC GRASP HEALS 80 HP/S (PLUS ~17 HP/S HOT FOR 3 SECS AFTER). SECONDARY FIRE DEALS 65 DPS (AND HEALS MOIRA 30 HP/S). THE ORB HEALS 65 HP/S (UP TO 300 HP) OR DEALS 50 DPS (UP TO 200 DMG). COALESCENCE HEALS 140 HP/S AND DEALS 85 DPS.
SYMMETRA'S PHOTON PROJECTOR RAMPS FROM ~65 TO ~195 DPS AS THE BEAM CHARGES. HER SHIELD GENERATOR WAS REMOVED, SHE NOW HAS A HOVERING BARRIER ABILITY.

ZENYATTA'S ORB OF DESTRUCTION DEALS 50 DMG (100 HEADSHOT). VOLLEY (5 ORBS): UP TO 250 DMG (500 HEADSHOT). ORB OF HARMONY: 35 HP/S. ORB OF DISCORD: +30% DAMAGE AMPLIFICATION ON ENEMIES. TRANSCENDENCE: 400 HP/S FOR 6 SECONDS IN A 10-METER RADIUS.

PLEASE DON'T SAY 'WE NEED MORE DAMAGE' OR 'WE'RE NOT GETTING ENOUGH DAMAGE'. EVEN IF YOUR TEAM IS OBVIOUSLY THE PROBLEM, WHEN STARTING THE SWITCH CONVERSATION, ALWAYS BLAME THE ENEMY TEAM'S STRONG PLAY, NOT YOUR TEAM'S SHITTY PLAY.
A LOT OF DIAMOND PLAYERS GET MAD AT THEIR TEAMMATES FOR DYING, INSTEAD OF THINKING IF THEY COULD HAVE SAVED THEM.
AS GENJI, CANCEL DEFLECT WITH DASH OR WALL CLIMB TO SURPRISE ENEMIES AND REGAIN MOBILITY.
AS ORISA, FORTIFY'S DAMAGE REDUCTION STACKS WITH ARMOR, SO DON'T JUST SAVE IT FOR WHEN YOU HAVE LOW HP!

SOMETIMES YOU WANT TO ASK A QUESTION THAT MIGHT BE PERCEIVED AS RUDE. (EX. GENJI WHERE WERE YOU?) LET YOUR TEAMMATE KNOW THAT YOU'RE JUST ASKING SO YOU KNOW HOW TO WORK WITH THEM BETTER AND NOT TO INSULT THEM.

KIRIKO'S PROTECTION SUZU CLEANSES ALMOST EVERYTHING: ANTI-HEAL, SLEEP DART, DISCORD ORB, HACK, BURN, FREEZE AND MORE. TIME IT JUST BEFORE THE EFFECT LANDS FOR MAXIMUM VALUE, IT'S ONE OF THE STRONGEST UTILITY TOOLS IN THE GAME.
KIRIKO'S SWIFT STEP TELEPORTS HER DIRECTLY TO AN ALLY THROUGH WALLS. USE IT BOTH TO ESCAPE AND TO QUICKLY REACH A DYING TEAMMATE ON THE OTHER SIDE OF THE MAP.
JUNKER QUEEN'S WOUNDS (APPLIED BY HER AXE AND BLADE) PREVENT HEALING ON ENEMIES HIT. IF YOU NEED HEALING BLOCKED ON A TANK, MAKE SURE JUNKER QUEEN KNIFES THEM FIRST.
ILLARI'S HEALING PYLON HEALS AUTOMATICALLY AND IS PLACED LIKE A TURRET. POSITION IT IN COVERED SPOTS WITH LINE OF SIGHT TO YOUR TEAM, IT FREES ILLARI TO PLAY MORE AGGRESSIVELY.
JUNO'S ORBITAL RAY BOOSTS BOTH HEALING AND DAMAGE FOR YOUR TEAM. TRY TO POP IT JUST BEFORE A TEAM FIGHT TO MAXIMIZE THE WINDOW OF AMPLIFICATION.
LIFEWEAVER'S LIFE GRIP PULLS AN ALLY TO SAFETY, BUT ALWAYS COMMUNICATE FIRST. PULLING A DIVE HERO MID-FIGHT OR A MERCY MID-REZ CAN RUIN THEIR PLAY.
RAMATTRA'S NEMESIS FORM GRANTS HIM EXTRA ARMOR AND HIS PUNCHES HIT THROUGH BARRIERS. SAVE NEMESIS FORM FOR WHEN YOU CAN PUNISH SHIELDING TANKS OR BURST DOWN A KEY TARGET.
HAZARD'S JAGGED WALL CAN BE PLACED OFFENSIVELY TO CUT OFF ESCAPE ROUTES OR DEFENSIVELY TO BLOCK DOOMFIST'S METEOR STRIKE AND WINSTON'S JUMP PACK LANDING.
VENTURE'S DRILL DASH MAKES THEM NEARLY UNTARGETABLE UNDERGROUND. USE IT TO DIVE IN, DEAL BURST DAMAGE, AND ESCAPE BEFORE THE ENEMY CAN REACT.
CASSIDY'S FLASHBANG IS AN AOE THAT DOESN'T NEED A DIRECT HIT, IT HINDERS ENEMIES (BLOCKING MOVEMENT ABILITIES AND SLOWING THEM), BUT NO LONGER STUNS. ADJUST YOUR COMBOS ACCORDINGLY.
MAUGA'S CAGE FIGHT TRAPS EVERYONE INSIDE, INCLUDING MAUGA HIMSELF. USE IT TO TRAP AN ISOLATED SUPPORT OR FLANKER IN A CORNER WHERE THEY CAN'T ESCAPE, NOT IN THE MIDDLE OF A BRAWL.
IN OVERWATCH, THERE IS NO LONGER TEMPORARY ARMOR OR YELLOW SHIELDS IN STANDARD GAMEPLAY. ALL TEMPORARY HP FROM ABILITIES (RALLY, SOUND BARRIER, ETC.) IS NOW OVERHEALTH, SHOWN IN GREEN.
IN 5V5, THERE IS ONLY ONE TANK PER TEAM. THIS MEANS YOUR TANK IS THE MOST CRITICAL PLAYER ON THE FIELD, PROTECT THEM AND FOLLOW THEIR LEAD INTO FIGHTS INSTEAD OF GOING SOLO.
SUPPORTS HAVE A PASSIVE: HEALTH REGENERATION STARTS FASTER (AFTER 3s INSTEAD OF 6s) AFTER TAKING DAMAGE. STAY IN COVER BRIEFLY AND YOU WILL OFTEN PATCH YOURSELF UP WITHOUT SPENDING HEALS.
HEROES NOW HAVE PERKS THAT UNLOCK MID-MATCH (MINOR AT LEVEL 2, MAJOR AT LEVEL 3). GET FAMILIAR WITH WHICH PERKS CHANGE YOUR PLAYSTYLE MOST AND PLAN YOUR CHOICES BEFORE THE MATCH.
AS SOMBRA, PRIORITIZE HACKING SUPPORTS AND KEY DAMAGE DEALERS, NOT JUST TANKS. HER REWORK REVEALS HACKED ENEMIES AND GIVES HER A DAMAGE BONUS AGAINST THEM.
